message:
✨ Add GA4 tracking for global search (Cmd+K) (#2070)

4 new events:
- ksc_global_search_opened: tracks keyboard vs click open method
- ksc_global_search_queried: fires on blur with query length + result count
- ksc_global_search_selected: tracks category and result position
- ksc_global_search_ask_ai: tracks when users choose "Ask AI" from search

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
